reviews.review_description: When this game came out I immediately played it and it also gave a bunch of friends and one of my friends became my girlfriend and I am thankful for her and I also really want the stick cuz I am in the discord and I also have a clan and I love the community and by the way my discord name is tbt_official on discord.

The game is super awesome and has some really cool and handsome moderators, the owner is super nice to the community and has a great personality (great edits btw) the community is super nice and there’s no toxic people and in conclusion this game is just super awesome and you should download it
This game is W cause of the moderators, the game, and the people. Very great game, I would recommend getting it

This game is nice and I would recommend getting this as your first gtag copy because you get long arms and see many moderators in the game like everyday that protects every server in the game even if someone said the n word that will get banned because they want this game being nice and calm and you can join the discord in the game and also listen to the rules like change your name and don't be toxic since this game is great

This game is just so so good they have a perfect player base and thanks to the mods in this game there is no toxic people and this is easily the best fan game I’ve ever played. Thank you for making this wonderful game .
It’s a great game and it’s also is a gorilla tag game with updates and lot more so I think u should get it for free on app lab

This game is so fun. I love how it gives you long arms and there nice people.
5/5 play this game rn

I haven't played this game since I got it on my phone. But I see that others like the game. The owners and moderators are good. I just wanna say to the owners and moderators that to keep being great and nice, and maybe teach people how to be nice, respectful, kind, and MOST IMPORTANTLY, not to be racist. Please. Thank you for your time, and have a good day!😊
